message:
Add OCSF extension support and improve attribute formatting - Add fetchExtensions() API client - Implement extension doc generation and overview pages - Refactor attribute formatting into reusable formatAttribute() function - Group class attributes by OCSF group (classification, primary, occurrence, context) instead of requirement - Improve HTML-to-Markdown conversion: support lists (
    ,
      ,
    1. ) and paragraphs (

      ) - Add Badge component imports for profile/extension indicators - Update OCSF version index to include extensions statistics - Fix badge vertical alignment in sidebar styles - Update sidebar navigation to include Extensions category Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5
